task_completion.description: Create or load the conditions CSV file with required columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a CSV file named 'sperling_conditions.csv' open in a text/spreadsheet editor with columns 'cue_freq' and 'cued_row', OR the PsychoPy loop properties dialog showing this file loaded.

task_completion.description: Add a visual stimulus for the 3x4 grid of consonants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy routine showing a Text component (or Code component) designed to display a grid of letters.

task_completion.description: Set the visual stimulus duration to exactly 50ms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text component properties dialog showing the 'Stop' time or 'Duration' set to exactly 0.05 seconds (or 50ms/frames equivalent).

task_completion.description: Add an auditory stimulus (tone) linked to the conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy routine showing a Sound component, with its properties dialog showing the frequency/sound value linked to a variable like '$cue_freq'.

task_completion.description: Set the auditory stimulus to start immediately after the visual grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sound component properties dialog showing the 'Start' time set to exactly 0.05 seconds.

task_completion.description: Add a keyboard response component and save the experiment to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy routine showing a Keyboard component added to collect responses, and the main PsychoPy window title bar showing the file saved as 'sperling_task.psyexp' in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the PsychoPy application GUI to build the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PsychoPy Builder or Coder interface being actively used, rather than the agent just writing a raw .psyexp XML file in a standard text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely interacted with component dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the properties dialog boxes for Text, Sound, and Keyboard components being opened and edited, proving the agent built the routine rather than downloading a pre-made file.

integrity.description: Verify the conditions file was genuinely created or edited.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or editing the CSV file contents in an editor or terminal, rather than just running a script to magically produce the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required experiment file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sperling_task.psyexp. The conditions file must be located at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/sperling_conditions.csv. The visual stimulus (grid) must have a duration of exactly 0.05s (50ms). The auditory stimulus (tone) must have a start time of exactly 0.05s to immediately follow the visual grid.
